heading: Cost-saving building technologies and construction techniques
label: 12810 Cost-saving building technologies and construction techniques
notes: Effective DateSection applicable to unexpended funds allocated under subchapter II of this chapter in fiscal year 1992, except as otherwise specifically provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1992 Amendment note under .section 223 of Pub. L. 102–550section 12704 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection applicable to unexpended funds allocated under subchapter II of this chapter in fiscal year 1992, except as otherwise specifically provided, see , set out as an Effective Date of 1992 Amendment note under .section 223 of Pub. L. 102–550section 12704 of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: The Secretary shall make available a model program to utilize cost-saving building technologies and construction techniques for purposes of providing homeownership and rental opportunities under this subchapter.
the extent to which innovative, cost-saving building and construction technologies are utilized;
the extent to which innovative, cost-saving construction techniques are utilized;
the extent to which units will be made available to low-income families and individuals;
the extent to which non-Federal public or private assistance is utilized; and
any other factor, determined by the Secretary to be appropriate.

children.heading: Guidelines
children.label: c Guidelines
children.text: The Secretary shall publish guidelines for the model program under this section not later than 180 days after .October 28, 1992

children.heading: Report
children.label: d Report
children.text: The Secretary shall submit a biennial report to the Congress on the utilization of the model program under this section.
